name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring well after each addition.
6. Fold in the oats and chocolate chips.
7. Scoop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8-9 minutes for a chewy cookie or 10-11 minutes for a crisp cookie.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire cooling rack.
Yield: Approximately 4 and 1/2 dozen cookies
